content:
type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
summary: Added transform_callback kw-only param to exif_transpose (both overloads + impl); callback(orientation) returns None/single Transpose/sequence of Transpose, overrides default mapping, supports in_place. My working copy of ImageOps.py shows no strip_metadata changes from you yet - if we're on separate copies, no action needed; if shared, let's confirm param order (in_place, transform_callback, strip_metadata) before finalizing so both features coexist cleanly.
